instructions: Review classification.existing_matches and classification.novel_categories. Edit, add, or remove entries, then re-run with --resume (without --classify-only) to apply.

policy.clause: a model that was proficient and reliable at coaching non-expert operators through each phase of a cyber attack could potentially make the ability to perform such attacks accessible to a wider group of actors

novel_categories.summary: Requests to guide a novice operator step by step through planning, executing, or adapting a cyber attack so they can carry it out successfully.

novel_categories.reasoning: This is concrete step-by-step instructional assistance that enables a novice to carry out offensive cyber operations. The existing leaves cover intrusion, social engineering, spoofing, or malware, but not the distinct behavior of coaching an operator through an attack.
